urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Indian activist on hunger strike for 20 days forcibly taken to hospital
latest.summary: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP).
latest.details: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.
latest.full_brief: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.

latest.title: US strikes hit Iran for seventh consecutive night
latest.summary: The US military has conducted its seventh consecutive night of strikes on Iran following the collapse of a ceasefire agreement. These strikes targeted various military infrastructures, while Iran retaliated by attacking US allies in the region.
latest.details: The US military has conducted its seventh consecutive night of strikes on Iran following the collapse of a ceasefire agreement. These strikes targeted various military infrastructures, while Iran retaliated by attacking US allies in the region. The situation has led to significant disruptions in shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil supplies. The ongoing conflict has raised concerns about the safety of civilians and military personnel in the affected areas.
latest.full_brief: The US military has conducted its seventh consecutive night of strikes on Iran following the collapse of a ceasefire agreement. These strikes targeted various military infrastructures, while Iran retaliated by attacking US allies in the region. The situation has led to significant disruptions in shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial route for global oil supplies. The ongoing conflict has raised concerns about the safety of civilians and military personnel in the affected areas.

latest.title: Brad Pitt's children are dropping their dad's surname - here's why I did the same
latest.summary: Hannah Leonard recently changed her surname to Leonard-Ripley, reflecting her mother's maiden name and her husband's surname. This change comes after years of feeling disconnected from her father's surname, which she inherited after her parents' divorce.
latest.details: Hannah Leonard recently changed her surname to Leonard-Ripley, reflecting her mother's maiden name and her husband's surname. This change comes after years of feeling disconnected from her father's surname, which she inherited after her parents' divorce. Meanwhile, two of Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt's adopted children are in the process of legally dropping their father's surname. The name change reflects a desire to create a personal identity that aligns with their current family dynamics.
latest.full_brief: Hannah Leonard recently changed her surname to Leonard-Ripley, reflecting her mother's maiden name and her husband's surname. This change comes after years of feeling disconnected from her father's surname, which she inherited after her parents' divorce. Meanwhile, two of Angelina Jolie and Brad Pitt's adopted children are in the process of legally dropping their father's surname. The name change reflects a desire to create a personal identity that aligns with their current family dynamics.

latest.title: He made history in Congress - then the Supreme Court changed its mind
latest.summary: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs.
latest.details: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs. However, a recent Supreme Court ruling has raised concerns about the future of minority representation in Congress. Local officials fear that if Figures loses his seat due to redistricting, the community will lose vital federal support.
latest.full_brief: Shomari Figures made history as the first black representative for Tuskegee in Congress. He secured $1 million in federal funding to build a civic center that will serve multiple community needs. However, a recent Supreme Court ruling has raised concerns about the future of minority representation in Congress. Local officials fear that if Figures loses his seat due to redistricting, the community will lose vital federal support.

latest.title: What this desert city can teach the world about tackling heat deaths
latest.summary: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning.
latest.details: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning. The city hired a heat officer in 2021, becoming the first in the world to do so. After a peak of 645 heat-related deaths in 2023, the number declined to 405 in 2025, attributed to policy changes.
latest.full_brief: Extreme temperatures have become a new normal, with significant heat-related deaths reported in various countries. Phoenix, Arizona, has implemented programs to reduce heat deaths, including access to cooling centers and air conditioning. The city hired a heat officer in 2021, becoming the first in the world to do so. After a peak of 645 heat-related deaths in 2023, the number declined to 405 in 2025, attributed to policy changes.

latest.title: Australia updates travel advice for Laos as charges announced over mass methanol poisoning
latest.summary: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel.
latest.details: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel. A distillery owner has been charged, but could face only three months in jail for the alleged offenses. The case remains open for 15 years, allowing for more serious charges if sufficient evidence is found.
latest.full_brief: The Australian government has raised its travel alert for Laos due to a recent mass methanol poisoning incident. Six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers, died after consuming methanol at a hostel. A distillery owner has been charged, but could face only three months in jail for the alleged offenses. The case remains open for 15 years, allowing for more serious charges if sufficient evidence is found.

latest.title: Taco Bell removes lettuce from menu in US after links to explosive diarrhoea parasite
latest.summary: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations.
latest.details: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell's supplier, Taylor Farms, is voluntarily removing the lettuce from the market.
latest.full_brief: Taco Bell has removed shredded iceberg lettuce from its menu in the US due to a cyclosporiasis outbreak linked to the product. The CDC reported that 1,645 people in five states have been infected, with 94 hospitalizations. The FDA advised against consuming the affected lettuce, which is sourced from Mexico. Taco Bell's supplier, Taylor Farms, is voluntarily removing the lettuce from the market.

latest.title: EU proposes slowing down cuts to carbon emissions for businesses
latest.summary: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction.
latest.details: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction. The proposals are still subject to approval by EU countries and lawmakers, which may take up to a year. The European Commission aims to align these changes with the EU's goal of reducing carbon emissions by 90% by 2040.
latest.full_brief: The European Union has proposed reforms to slow down cuts to greenhouse gas emissions limits for businesses. These changes would allow some industries to obtain emission allowances until 2038, extending the timeline for carbon output reduction. The proposals are still subject to approval by EU countries and lawmakers, which may take up to a year. The European Commission aims to align these changes with the EU's goal of reducing carbon emissions by 90% by 2040.

latest.title: ‘It’s only going to get worse’: wildfires forcing firefighters to make impossible choices
latest.summary: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat.
latest.details: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.
latest.full_brief: Firefighters are increasingly facing difficult decisions as wildfires become more intense and widespread due to climate change. The situation has led to operational challenges, with firefighters needing to prioritize which blazes to combat. Recent wildfires in western Europe have resulted in record-breaking destruction and numerous fatalities. Smoke from Canadian wildfires has also impacted air quality in cities like Toronto, making it the most polluted city in the world at one point.

latest.title: ‘We are preserving a tradition’: how Ghana’s sensationalist film posters became collectible art
latest.summary: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations.
latest.details: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.
latest.full_brief: Hand-painted film posters have become a significant part of Ghana's film culture, particularly from the late 1970s to the early 2000s. Artists created these posters as reinterpretations of films, often leading to humorous and surreal representations. The practice declined with the rise of personal televisions, but interest in these artworks has surged due to online marketing. Deadly Prey Gallery, co-founded by Robert Kofi, works to preserve this art form and connect artists with a global audience.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.

skipped_examples.title: Many Ukrainian soldiers outraged over removal of defence minister, troops tell BBC
